title: COLLEGE ASSISTANCE MIGRANT PROGRAM - 211info
text: TREASURE VALLEY COMMUNITY COLLEGE COLLEGE ASSISTANCE MIGRANT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to students from migrant and seasonal farm worker backgrounds during their first year in college. Services may include financial support to help cover college expenses and are subject to funding availability. Also offers support for families, mentoring, tutoring, academic and career advice, and referrals to community resources. 650 College Boulevard Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following criteria: -Be a permanent resident or citizen of the United States -Be a full-time (12 credits), first-year incoming student attending TVCC -Come from an agricultural background For the agricultural background, one of the following: -Applicant or guardian has worked at least 75 days in the past 24 months in migrant/seasonal farm work (including crop, dairy, poultry or livestock production, the cultivation or harvest of trees, or on a fish farm) -Must be eligible or have participated in a Migrant Education Program (MEP) -Must be eligible or have participated in National Farmworker Jobs Program (NFJP) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 881-5533 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 881-5533 Raul Isaac Villanueva [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Application available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Migrant Education Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Migrants Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - TREASURE VALLEY COMMUNITY COLLEGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TREASURE VALLEY COMMUNITY COLLEGE
